steps.title: Read the parenthetical definition
steps.content: The underlined phrase appears in parentheses immediately after the word microfilm. It explains that microfilm is film containing scaled-down reproductions of documents, so its function is to define that term.

steps.title: Reject unrelated functions
steps.content: Choice A focuses on a famous person, but the parenthetical explains a technology. Choice C invents a historical debate. Choice D invents an unexpected finding, while the underlined phrase only clarifies a word. The answer is B.
